section.heading: Short title

content.p: This subchapter may be cited as the “Trust Indenture Act of 1939.”

section.sourceCredit: (May 27, 1933, ch. 38, title III, § 301, as added Aug. 3, 1939, ch. 411, 53 Stat. 1149.)

note.heading: Short Title of 1990 Amendment
note.p: Pub. L. 101–550, title IV, § 401, Nov. 15, 1990, 104 Stat. 2721, provided that: “This title [amending sections 77ccc to 77eee, 77iii to 77rrr, and 77vvv of this title] may be cited as the ‘Trust Indenture Reform Act of 1990’.”
